evidence_spans.span: 嘉宾到场错门，邀请函加入口图
签到漏姓名，表格旁补填写样例
茶歇排队混乱，动线牌挂分流句
今天停车被问，请在短信里塞停车提醒

abstain_reason: The turn lists several local event-operation fixes, but the symptoms are mixed across different boundaries (entrance, sign-in, queueing, parking) and does not clearly show recurrence of one same-class failure after prior patches failed.
